textPlain: That image at the top is eerily like Romanesco. I actually thought it was at first, but it's synthetic if you look at the left part (... or is it?).[0] https://duckduckgo.com/?q=Romanesco&iar=images&t=ffab&iai=ht...
The conference in question: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suFspoY3bBUThe article is a good "first introduction" to the presentation.
